base_observation.command: node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const s=fs.readFileSync("src/cljs/nr/gameboard/board.cljs","utf8");const calls=(s.match(/replay-opponent-hand\?/g)||[]).length;if(!s.includes("(defn replay-opponent-hand?")||!s.includes("[facedown-card (:side card)]")||calls<3){console.error("replay opponent hand visibility predicate is missing");process.exit(1)}'
